name: Fruit Crisp
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Apples, cooking, peeled and sliced
3 cups Pears, peeled, cored, and sliced
1/2 cup Brown Sugar OR 1/2 cup Maple Syrup Granules
recipeInstructions:
1. Place fruit in an 8 1/2-inch round glass dish.
2. Sprinkle with lemon juice.
3. In a large bowl, cut butter into flour using a pastry cutter.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients until combined.
5. Sprinkle mixture evenly over apples and pears.
6. Microwave, uncovered, on high for 11 to 13 minutes, or until fruit is tender, rotating the dish halfway through cooking time.
7. Let stand until cool enough to serve. Serves 6-8.
Per serving: 411 cal; 6 g prot; 16 g fat; 63 g carb; 0 chol; 107 mg sod; 6 g fiber
